summary: Updated backend random profile naming to use a dedicated name-generation library instead of a timestamp pattern. I added the `Bogus` NuGet package to `DuckGo.csproj`, imported it in `ProfileService.cs`, and changed `EnsureProfileName` so blank profile names now become English-style generated names using Bogus word datasets plus a numeric suffix, e.g. adjective/noun combinations. I then checked diagnostics for the updated service and project file and confirmed there are no lint issues.
current_status: Empty profile names are now handled entirely by the backend with library-generated English random names, while the earlier Create Profile modal sync, proxy persistence, Start URL, and fingerprint behavior changes remain intact.
